description: The Radwan Force is [Hezbollah](/orgs/hezbollah)'s elite special operations unit, estimated at 2,500 fighters. Founded in 2006 as the Intervention Unit with assistance from the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force), it was renamed in April 2008 after the operational alias of [Imad Mughniyeh](/people/imad-mughniyeh) ("Hajj Radwan") following his assassination. The unit specializes in cross-border raids, infiltration, anti-tank warfare, and commando operations. It gained extensive combat experience during the Syrian civil war. [Ibrahim Aqil](/people/ibrahim-aqil) commanded the force until his killing in an Israeli airstrike in September 2024.
editorial_notes: Also known as Unit 125. Named after Imad Mughniyeh's alias. After Aqil's death Sep 2024, Abu Ali Reda Abbas appointed commander.
